task.label: request ENISA to prepare a candidate cybersecurity certification scheme

conditions.condition: on the basis of the Union rolling work programme

task.label: request ENISA to review an existing European cybersecurity certification scheme

conditions.condition: on the basis of the Union rolling work programme

task.label: request ENISA to prepare a candidate cybersecurity certification scheme

conditions.condition: in duly justified cases
the candidate scheme is not included in the Union rolling work programme

task.label: request ENISA to review an existing European cybersecurity certification scheme

conditions.condition: in duly justified cases
the existing scheme is not included in the Union rolling work programme

task.label: update the Union rolling work programme

conditions.condition: following a request under paragraph 2

task.label: prepare a candidate cybersecurity certification scheme

conditions.condition: following a request from the Commission or ECCG pursuant to Article 48
candidate scheme must meet requirements set out in Articles 51, 52 and 54

task.label: prepare a candidate cybersecurity certification scheme

conditions.condition: following a request from the ECCG pursuant to Article 48(2)
candidate scheme must meet requirements set out in Articles 51, 52 and 54

task.label: give reasons for refusing a request to prepare a candidate scheme

conditions.condition: if ENISA refuses a request from the ECCG pursuant to Article 48(2)

task.label: take the decision to refuse a request to prepare a candidate scheme

conditions.condition: if ENISA decides to refuse a request from the ECCG pursuant to Article 48(2)
when preparing a candidate scheme

task.label: establish an ad hoc working group

conditions.condition: for each candidate scheme being prepared

task.label: provide ENISA with assistance and expert advice

conditions.condition: in relation to the preparation of the candidate scheme

task.label: adopt an opinion on the candidate scheme
take utmost account of the ECCG opinion

conditions.condition: before transmitting the candidate scheme prepared in accordance with paragraphs 3, 4 and 5 to the Commission

exception.description: The absence of an ECCG opinion shall not prevent ENISA from transmitting the candidate scheme to the Commission
The opinion of the ECCG shall not bind ENISA

conditions.condition: based on the candidate scheme prepared by ENISA
the scheme meets requirements set out in Articles 51, 52 and 54
in accordance with the examination procedure referred to in Article 66(2)

task.label: evaluate each adopted European cybersecurity certification scheme

conditions.condition: at least every five years
taking into account feedback received from interested parties

task.label: request ENISA to start the process of developing a revised candidate scheme in accordance with Article 48 and Article 49

conditions.condition: if necessary, following evaluation of an adopted European cybersecurity certification scheme
